signal_title: FTC Announces Workshop on Age Verification Technologies
risk_rationale: The FTC workshop indicates a regulatory interest in age verification technologies, which could lead to future regulatory changes impacting TikTok's age assurance posture. While the workshop itself does not impose immediate requirements, it signals potential future compliance obligations.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: TikTok states it uses machine learning and safety review to identify likely under-13 users and remove/limit access.
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Examine age verification technologies; gather information on effectiveness and challenges; explore potential improvements.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The current baseline relies on machine learning and safety reviews, which may not align with future regulatory expectations for age verification technologies.

remediations.title: Enhance Age Verification Methods
remediations.description: Evaluate and potentially enhance TikTok's age verification methods in anticipation of future regulatory changes. Consider participating in the FTC workshop to gain insights and align with best practices.
acceptance_criteria: Participation in the FTC workshop and documentation of insights gained.
Assessment of current age verification methods against industry best practices.
Implementation plan for potential enhancements to age verification technologies.

business_impact: Potential future regulatory changes could require updates to age verification processes, impacting user onboarding and compliance costs.
recommended_actions: Monitor outcomes of the FTC workshop for regulatory signals.
Engage with industry groups to stay informed on age verification best practices.
Prepare a contingency plan for potential updates to age verification processes.
